creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 156421
svn patch to tint-devel 20150506

The attached svn patch updates x11/tint-devel to a new snapshot as of today, 6. May 2015. Changes to the port are:

- Since upstream migrated from svn to git, switch to the snapshot date for version numbers.
- README was renamed to README.md

The port was tested with Poudriere in a FreeBSD 10.1 jail.
